chain.thought:
Add necessary columns to the table.
The question asks about the player drafted by the Chicago Bears who attended the same college as fellow draftee Dustin Lyman. We need to know the college of each drafted player. We extract the value from column "college" and create a different column "player college" for each row. The datatype is String.

Select relevant rows.
The question aims to find out which player drafted by the Chicago Bears in 2000 attended the same college as Dustin Lyman. We need to look at the relevant rows in the table that describe the players and their colleges, specifically focusing on Dustin Lyman's college (Wake Forest) and finding another player who attended the same college.

Filter out useless columns.
similar words of the question link to columns:
the chicago bears draft -> name
attended the same college -> college
fellow draftee dustin lyman -> name, college
column value of the question link to columns:
2000 -> round, pick
dustin lyman -> name
semantic sentence of the question link to columns:
who did the chicago bears draft -> name
attended the same college as fellow draftee dustin lyman -> college

The question is asking to determine which Chicago Bears draftees in 2000 attended the same college as Dustin Lyman. Since each row represents an individual draftee and the "college" column indicates where each attended, we need to compare the colleges of different draftees. We can group by the "college" column to see which other draftees share the same college as Dustin Lyman. We can use the f_group_column(college) operation to group the draftees based on their college to analyze this situation.

Dustin Lyman attended Wake Forest, and Reggie Austin also attended Wake Forest. Therefore, the Chicago Bears drafted Reggie Austin in 2000 who attended the same college as fellow draftee Dustin Lyman.

judge_thought: Explanation: The question asks who the Chicago Bears drafted in 2000 that attended the same college as fellow draftee Dustin Lyman. According to the table, Dustin Lyman attended Wake Forest University. Looking at the other draftees, Reggie Austin also attended Wake Forest University. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of Reggie Austin is correct, as he is the only other Bears draftee who attended the same college as Dustin Lyman.
